metadata.description: devedge developer-experience plugins for Claude Code — skills for the common devedge operations: model the domain, bootstrap a service, run it locally, publish its API and typed client, scaffold a micro-frontend, host uFEs in a shell, and compose services into one binary.

plugins.name: new-service
plugins.description: Bootstrap and build a microservice with devedge-sdk from a single prompt: discover and pin the SDK, scaffold a fail-closed gRPC/REST service, model the domain, generate, build, and run.

plugins.name: publish-api
plugins.description: Publish a devedge service's public API as OpenAPI v3 through apx and generate/consume a typed TypeScript client, with a local hot-loop for iterating against an unreleased API.

plugins.name: run-locally
plugins.description: Bring a devedge service up on the local dev edge and round-trip it: install/start the daemon, register routes from devedge.yaml, reach the service over its *.dev.test hostname with working TLS, and diagnose why it isn't reachable.

plugins.name: new-ufe
plugins.description: Scaffold a devedge micro-frontend (uFE) with `de ufe new`: an Angular-15 + single-spa app wired to the open-core @infobloxopen/devedge-ufe-* SDK — correct on first run (validated nav group, session in Angular DI, bearer interceptor) — and registered into a kind:Shell roster so a shell hosts it.

plugins.name: new-shell
plugins.description: Scaffold and run a single-spa shell that hosts your devedge uFEs behind a left side-nav menu with `de ufe shell`: reads the kind:Shell roster `de ufe new` writes and renders each uFE in the shell — the self-contained 'see it render' loop. `--preset-dir` is an extension point to overlay a session provider, design system, and branded/grouped nav; `de ufe override` injects a local uFE into a live hosted shell.

plugins.name: compose-services
plugins.description: Compose several devedge service modules into ONE host process (a k3s-style suite binary) and deploy it: init a kind:Composition, add member modules, tidy for descriptor/version conflicts, build a static host + composition.lock, smoke-test, then run or render Helm artifacts.

plugins.name: model-domain
plugins.description: Model a devedge domain with DDD rigor: find the invariants, draw aggregate boundaries (root/members vs cross-aggregate references), and expose read surfaces over the core model — mapped onto devedge's infoblox.ddd.v1 aggregates, Validate hook, and multi-surface projections.
